# Soft Trigger Assistant Spectacle Contract

## Soft trigger
full compaction soft trigger defaults to 72% so long sessions summarize earlier after async pre-rot

## Ladder alignment
async 60% / micro 50–60% / swarm handoff 65% / soft 72% / hard 92% form a progressive reclaim ladder

## Assistant spectacle
assistant transcript bullets pulse while streaming and use spectacular ambient motion when finalized

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/assistant-message vitest + live TUI transcript
